title: pelargonium citriodorum
intro: Pelargonium citriodorum, also known as the Lemon Geranium or Lemon-scented Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the Geraniaceae family, characterized by its distinctive citrus-like fragrance and bright, pinkish-red flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Pelargonium citriodorum include reducing stress, anxiety, and inflammation, as well as providing relief from digestive issues and skin problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or essential oil, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
